{"success":true,"response":"The process rule `J09C` has been executed as specified.

Key outcomes:
- Working data was created, classified (`ENTSCHEIDUNG` set to `KSA`/`EVU` per rules), and enriched via joins with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- Customer fields were taken from `SALES_MASTER` where available, otherwise from `NET_MASTER`.
- A CSV file `J09C.csv` was generated with the required columns and order at:
  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_0_values_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09C_seed_4506/J09C.csv`
- An email with this CSV attached was sent to `meter.readings@evu.com` for the EVU recipient.
- All temporary tables (`J09C_temp`, `J09C_temp_step4`, `J09C_temp_step5`, `J09C_temp_final`) were deleted.","message":"Process agent executed successfully","hit_recursion_limit":false,"hit_timeout":false}

structured_content.response:
The process rule `J09C` has been executed as specified.

Key outcomes:
- Working data was created, classified (`ENTSCHEIDUNG` set to `KSA`/`EVU` per rules), and enriched via joins with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- Customer fields were taken from `SALES_MASTER` where available, otherwise from `NET_MASTER`.
- A CSV file `J09C.csv` was generated with the required columns and order at:
  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_0_values_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09C_seed_4506/J09C.csv`
- An email with this CSV attached was sent to `meter.readings@evu.com` for the EVU recipient.
- All temporary tables (`J09C_temp`, `J09C_temp_step4`, `J09C_temp_step5`, `J09C_temp_final`) were deleted.

kwargs.content:
The process rule with ID `J09C` has been executed successfully.

Summary of what was done:
- The working data set was built, classified (`ENTSCHEIDUNG` set to `KSA`/`EVU` according to the rule), and enriched via joins with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- Customer-related fields were taken from `SALES_MASTER` when present, otherwise from `NET_MASTER`.
- A CSV file `J09C.csv` was generated with the required columns and order at:
  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_0_values_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09C_seed_4506/J09C.csv`
- An email with this CSV attached was sent to `meter.readings@evu.com` (EVU recipient).
- All intermediate/temporary tables (`J09C_temp`, `J09C_temp_step4`, `J09C_temp_step5`, `J09C_temp_final`) were dropped/cleaned up.

If you want, I can now:
- Re-run `J09C` with modified parameters (e.g., different recipient or file name), or
- Create a new process rule (from text or a BPMN file) for a variant of this flow.
